=== STEP 394 ===

--- REQUEST ---

Diffs will be shown for all changed files after BUILD succeeds.

--- RESPONSE ---


Let me remove the stale cargo-target directory and Cargo.lock that might be causing issues.

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/rwall/Cargo.lock
CONTENT:
<<<
# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
# It is not intended for manual editing.
version = 4

[[package]]
name = "rwall"
version = "0.1.0"

[[package]]
name = "libc"
version = "0.2.155"
source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
checksum = "0g"

[[package]]
name = "rwall"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = [
 "libc",
]

>>>
